name: Upgrade LXC
description:
Upgrades an existing LXC container in-place using a new OCI image. Stops the container, backs up its config, destroys and recreates it with the new rootfs at the same VMID (preserving all settings), then starts it again.

Flow:
- 011: Download OCI image and import to Proxmox storage (run separately before this template)
- 221: Validate container and extract installed addons
- 231: Stop, backup, destroy, recreate, merge config, start (includes readiness wait)

parameters.name: OCI Image
parameters.description: OCI image reference used to upgrade the container (from 011-get-oci-image.json).

parameters.name: Template Path
parameters.description: Path to the downloaded OCI template (from 011-get-oci-image.json).

parameters.name: OS Type
parameters.description: Optional OS type from the downloaded OCI image (from 011-get-oci-image.json).

parameters.name: Container VM ID
parameters.description: LXC container ID to upgrade in-place. Must be an oci-lxc-deployer managed container.
